shared_rules: Guard, Handoff, and Audit are independent dimensions.
Standard must not produce a single overall score.
Missing evidence does not satisfy a predicate.
Critical Gate failure returns C for the affected dimension.
Effective dimension window uses dimension-specific window_days first, then top-level sample_window_days, then no sustained sample window.
Level 8 requires at least 30 days of sustained evidence.
Level 9 requires at least 90 days of sustained evidence.
The rubric consumes summary evidence and does not require source code, raw diff, prompt, secret, or credential upload.

level_predicates.0: enabled=false or policy.present is missing or false
level_predicates.3: level 2 and policy.fail_closed=true and policy.protected_path_action=block and effective_protected_path_prefixes has at least one entry
level_predicates.4: level 3 and policy.change_budget_present=true and policy.outside_allowed_action is review or block
level_predicates.5: level 4 and ci.detected=true and ci.guard_check_command_detected=true and ci.fails_on_review_or_block=true
level_predicates.7: level 6 and decisions.present=true and decisions.unresolved_review_count=0 and decisions.unresolved_block_count=0
level_predicates.8: level 7 and decisions.window_days>=30 and proofs has at least one entry
level_predicates.9: level 8 and decisions.window_days>=90 and dependency/source-test/mixed-feature-refactor discipline rules are all present and CI proof exists

caps.condition: decisions.window_days is missing and top-level sample_window_days is missing
effective guard window is less than 30 days
effective guard window is less than 90 days

level_predicates.0: enabled=false or packets.present is missing or false
level_predicates.5: level 4 and latest_packet.repo_orientation_fresh=true and latest_packet.target_repo_matches=true and latest_packet.age_days<=7
level_predicates.6: level 5 and latest_packet.decision_refs_count>=1 and latest_packet.confidence is medium or high
level_predicates.7: level 6 and continuity.session_switches_with_packet equals continuity.session_switch_count and continuity.stale_packet_count=0
level_predicates.9: level 8 and packets.window_days>=90 and continuity.session_switch_count>=5 and latest_packet.completed_facts_with_evidence_count>=10 and latest_packet.decision_refs_count>=3

caps.condition: packets.window_days is missing and top-level sample_window_days is missing
effective handoff window is less than 30 days
effective handoff window is less than 90 days

critical_gates.condition: enabled=true and log.present=true and (log.readable=false or log.schema_supported=false)

level_predicates.0: enabled=false or log.present is missing or false or log.readable=false
level_predicates.3: level 2 and records.record_count>=1 and earliest/latest record timestamps are present
level_predicates.6: level 5 and block/review explain coverage equals block/review decision counts
level_predicates.8: level 7 and effective audit window is at least 30 days and records.record_count>=10
level_predicates.9: level 8 and effective audit window is at least 90 days and log.integrity_check_passed=true and either change_report_generated_in_window=true or failure_pattern_distribution_present=true

caps.condition: records window is missing and top-level sample_window_days is missing
effective audit window is less than 30 days
effective audit window is less than 90 days
